segments.text: these videos have gone viral on Instagram showing the importance of a strong chin and this is one part of the coin if you can create clear definition the base of the whole of the human head it becomes what I see as the base of the presentation box of the eyes essentially the Apex or the lowest structure of the face that makes everything else look part of that structure in a seamless way the problem is you can also make chins too strong and this then becomes masculinizing and this is one of the key points to remember if you're thinking about dermal fillers as a solution to Chin weakness is that everything you do to make chins bigger also has the risk of making chins look more masculine which can be your goal but often isn't often we're just trying to get just that balance between definition structure and then overdoing and becoming more masculine so that narrow focal point being very aware of the details the lines and the planes that connect the chin together with the rest of the face can help you make good decisions about what will actually enhance Beauty and not go too far and create a more masculine appearance

transcript: these videos have gone viral on Instagram showing the importance of a strong chin and this is one part of the coin if you can create clear definition the base of the whole of the human head it becomes what I see as the base of the presentation box of the eyes essentially the Apex or the lowest structure of the face that makes everything else look part of that structure in a seamless way the problem is you can also make chins too strong and this then becomes masculinizing and this is one of the key points to remember if you're thinking about dermal fillers as a solution to Chin weakness is that everything you do to make chins bigger also has the risk of making chins look more masculine which can be your goal but often isn't often we're just trying to get just that balance between definition structure and then overdoing and becoming more masculine so that narrow focal point being very aware of the details the lines and the planes that connect the chin together with the rest of the face can help you make good decisions about what will actually enhance Beauty and not go too far and create a more masculine appearance
